evals.name: new-django-feature-plan
evals.prompt: Add a Django feature where logged-in users can rename a project. Show me the outside-in TDD plan and the first tests to write.
evals.expected_output: Starts from user behavior, chooses a thin outer functional test, maps inner Django tests by layer, avoids speculative implementation, and includes verification commands.

evals.name: working-state-refactor
evals.prompt: I need to split this Django view into separate create and detail flows without breaking existing behavior. How should I do it test-first?
evals.expected_output: Recommends working-state-to-working-state steps, identifies regression coverage, uses focused view/URL/template tests, and keeps the outer test as a safety check.
